series_metadata.series_description: Record of employment history. May contain: applications;letters of appointment; performance evaluations; personnel actions; signed separationletters; employee consents/acknowledgments; and correspondence pertaining toemployee.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 30 days after hard copy is prepped, scanned and indexed (imaged) and quality control is completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in MIS on optical disk for50 years, then erase provided audits are completed and released, all discrepancies are resolved, and there is no litigation pending., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
